name: D2L Brightspace LMS API
what_it_does: D2L Brightspace REST API (Valence) for enterprise LMS platform. Enables AI agents to manage course and content management, handle learner enrollment and completion tracking, access grade management and assessment data, retrieve learning analytics and engagement data, manage quiz and assignment workflows, handle discussion and collaboration data, access course content and SCORM/xAPI data, retrieve learner progress and competency data, manage instructor and course administration, and integrate LMS data with SIS, HR, and content authoring platforms.
use_cases: Managing course enrollment and learner progress from higher education automation agents
Accessing grade and assessment data from academic analytics agents
Retrieving learning engagement and completion analytics from L&D agents
Integrating LMS with SIS enrollment data from campus technology agents
not_for: K-12 without higher education and corporate learning management focus
Simple training tracking without full LMS course and content management
Non-institutional learning without enterprise LMS and SIS integration
best_when: A university, college, or large organization using D2L Brightspace wants AI agents to automate course management, learner enrollment, grade tracking, engagement analytics, and SIS integration.
avoid_when: FERPA: Student educational records are federally protected. Grade data and learner progress are sensitive. K-12 student data under COPPA requires additional protections. Academic integrity — automated content access must respect quiz and assessment controls.

auth.notes: D2L Brightspace uses OAuth 2.0 (Valence auth) for API access. User and system-level credentials with course, enrollment, and grade scopes. Extensive developer documentation (Valence Docs). GitHub presence. Webhooks for course and enrollment events. Learning Data Platform (LDS) for analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise LMS pricing
pricing.notes: Kitchener, Ontario, Canada. Founded 1999. Major higher education LMS platform. Used by 1,200+ institutions in 50+ countries. 15M+ learners. Strong higher education and corporate learning market. Competes with Canvas (Instructure) and Blackboard (Anthology) for higher ed LMS. Learning Data Platform for advanced analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in Valence docs

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA: Student grade and enrollment data is federally protected — BAA-equivalent agreements required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API (Valence) with comprehensive documentation and GitHub
Valence API versioning is tied to LMS version — check version compatibility for institution's deployment
Academic integrity — automated quiz or assessment access must respect timed and lockdown browser controls
Learning Data Platform (LDS) is separate from Valence API — analytics data accessed differently
COPPA compliance required for K-12 deployments — additional parental consent requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Student educational records. FERPA, COPPA, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. Multi-region. Academic integrity considerations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Student educational data. FERPA, COPPA, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Academic records protection.
